title: DecisionPayload
description: KEYSTONE terminal-first analytics contract. The single decision-oriented summary an agent (Claude Code skill -> traigent-analytics-mcp -> backend) returns for one optimization run so the operator can decide what to do next without opening the web portal. CLIENT-SAFE: carries only a headline, a coarse confidence bucket, one recommended action, evidence labels, and named drill-down tools. It MUST NOT carry raw proprietary signal values, raw prompt/response text, or formulas; those stay backend-side and are surfaced (if at all) only through bounded drill-down contracts.

run_id.description: Identifier of the optimization run this decision summarizes.

project_id.description: Identifier of the project the run belongs to (tenant/project scoping context).

intent.description: What the operator most likely wants to do next given this run's posture.

headline.description: One-line, client-safe summary of the run outcome and the recommended direction.

confidence.description: Coarse confidence bucket for the recommendation. Buckets only; no numeric scores.

recommended_action.description: The single highest-value next action for this run.

config_id.description: Optional configuration this action targets (e.g. the config to promote).

why.description: Templated, client-safe rationale. MUST NOT carry proprietary signal values.

evidence.description: Coarse evidence labels supporting the recommendation. May be empty when no safe evidence is available.

summary.description: Templated, client-safe one-line description of the evidence.

drilldowns.description: Named follow-up analyses the operator can request, each mapped to an MCP/skill tool that returns a bounded analytics contract.

label.description: Human-readable label for the drill-down (e.g. 'See the cost/quality frontier').

tool.description: Name of the analytics tool that produces this drill-down (e.g. 'run_pareto').

warnings.description: Client-safe caveats about reliability or scope of this decision (e.g. small sample, flat frontier).
